speaker: COUNTESS
text: It hath happened all as I would have had it,

speaker: COUNTESS
text: save that he comes not along with her.

speaker: FOOL
text: By my troth, I take my young lord to be a very

speaker: FOOL
text: melancholy man.

speaker: COUNTESS
text: By what observance, I pray you?

speaker: FOOL
text: Why, he will look upon his boot and sing, mend

speaker: FOOL
text: the ruff and sing, ask questions and sing, pick his

speaker: FOOL
text: teeth and sing. I know a man that had this trick of

speaker: FOOL
text: melancholy sold a goodly manor for a song.

speaker: COUNTESS
text: Let me see what he writes and when he

speaker: COUNTESS
text: means to come.

speaker: FOOL
text: I have no mind to Isbel since I was at court. Our

speaker: FOOL
text: old lings and our Isbels o’ th’ country are nothing

speaker: FOOL
text: like your old ling and your Isbels o’ th’ court. The

speaker: FOOL
text: brains of my Cupid’s knocked out, and I begin to

speaker: FOOL
text: love as an old man loves money, with no stomach.

speaker: COUNTESS
text: What have we here?

speaker: FOOL
text: E’en that you have there.

speaker: COUNTESS
text: This is not well, rash and unbridled boy:

speaker: COUNTESS
text: To fly the favors of so good a king,

speaker: COUNTESS
text: To pluck his indignation on thy head

speaker: COUNTESS
text: By the misprizing of a maid too virtuous

speaker: COUNTESS
text: For the contempt of empire.

speaker: FOOL
text: O madam, yonder is heavy news within, between

speaker: FOOL
text: two soldiers and my young lady.

speaker: COUNTESS
text: What is the matter?

speaker: FOOL
text: Nay, there is some comfort in the news, some

speaker: FOOL
text: comfort. Your son will not be killed so soon as I

speaker: FOOL
text: thought he would.

speaker: COUNTESS
text: Why should he be killed?

speaker: FOOL
text: So say I, madam, if he run away, as I hear he

speaker: FOOL
text: does. The danger is in standing to ’t; that’s the loss

speaker: FOOL
text: of men, though it be the getting of children. Here

speaker: FOOL
text: they come will tell you more. For my part, I only

speaker: FOOL
text: hear your son was run away.

speaker:
FIRST
               
              GENTLEMAN
text: Save you, good madam.

speaker: HELEN
text: Madam, my lord is gone, forever gone.

speaker:
SECOND
               
              GENTLEMAN
text: Do not say so.

speaker: COUNTESS
text: Think upon patience, pray you.—Gentlemen,

speaker: COUNTESS
text: I have felt so many quirks of joy and grief

speaker: COUNTESS
text: That the first face of neither on the start

speaker: COUNTESS
text: Can woman me unto ’t. Where is my son, I pray you?

speaker:
SECOND
               
              GENTLEMAN
text: Madam, he’s gone to serve the Duke of Florence.

speaker:
SECOND
               
              GENTLEMAN
text: We met him thitherward, for thence we came,

speaker:
SECOND
               
              GENTLEMAN
text: And, after some dispatch in hand at court,

speaker:
SECOND
               
              GENTLEMAN
text: Thither we bend again.

speaker: HELEN
text: Look on his letter, madam; here’s my passport.

speaker: HELEN
text: This is a dreadful sentence.

speaker: COUNTESS
text: Brought you this letter, gentlemen?

speaker:
SECOND
               
              GENTLEMAN
text: Ay, madam,

speaker:
SECOND
               
              GENTLEMAN
text: And for the contents’ sake are sorry for our pains.

speaker: COUNTESS
text: I prithee, lady, have a better cheer.

speaker: COUNTESS
text: If thou engrossest all the griefs are thine,

speaker: COUNTESS
text: Thou robb’st me of a moiety. He was my son,

speaker: COUNTESS
text: But I do wash his name out of my blood,

speaker: COUNTESS
text: And thou art all my child.—Towards Florence is he?

speaker:
SECOND
               
              GENTLEMAN
text: Ay, madam.

speaker: COUNTESS
text: And to be a soldier?

speaker:
SECOND
               
              GENTLEMAN
text: Such is his noble purpose, and, believe ’t,

speaker:
SECOND
               
              GENTLEMAN
text: The Duke will lay upon him all the honor

speaker:
SECOND
               
              GENTLEMAN
text: That good convenience claims.

speaker: COUNTESS
text: Return you thither?

speaker:
FIRST
               
              GENTLEMAN
text: Ay, madam, with the swiftest wing of speed.

speaker: HELEN
text:
Till
                 
                I
                 
                have
                 
                no
                 
                wife
                 
                I
                 
                have
                 
                nothing
                 
                in
                 
                France
                .

speaker: HELEN
text: ’Tis bitter.

speaker: COUNTESS
text: Find you that there?

speaker: HELEN
text: Ay, madam.

speaker:
FIRST
               
              GENTLEMAN
text: ’Tis but the boldness of his hand, haply,

speaker:
FIRST
               
              GENTLEMAN
text: Which his heart was not consenting to.

speaker: COUNTESS
text: Nothing in France until he have no wife!

speaker: COUNTESS
text: There’s nothing here that is too good for him

speaker: COUNTESS
text: But only she, and she deserves a lord

speaker: COUNTESS
text: That twenty such rude boys might tend upon

speaker: COUNTESS
text: And call her hourly mistress. Who was with him?

speaker:
FIRST
               
              GENTLEMAN
text: A servant only, and a gentleman

speaker:
FIRST
               
              GENTLEMAN
text: Which I have sometime known.

speaker: COUNTESS
text: Parolles was it not?

speaker:
FIRST
               
              GENTLEMAN
text: Ay, my good lady, he.

speaker: COUNTESS
text: A very tainted fellow, and full of wickedness.

speaker: COUNTESS
text: My son corrupts a well-derivèd nature

speaker: COUNTESS
text: With his inducement.

speaker:
FIRST
               
              GENTLEMAN
text: Indeed, good lady,

speaker:
FIRST
               
              GENTLEMAN
text: The fellow has a deal of that too much

speaker:
FIRST
               
              GENTLEMAN
text: Which holds him much to have.

speaker: COUNTESS
text: You’re welcome, gentlemen.

speaker: COUNTESS
text: I will entreat you when you see my son

speaker: COUNTESS
text: To tell him that his sword can never win

speaker: COUNTESS
text: The honor that he loses. More I’ll entreat you

speaker: COUNTESS
text: Written to bear along.

speaker:
SECOND
               
              GENTLEMAN
text: We serve you, madam,

speaker:
SECOND
               
              GENTLEMAN
text: In that and all your worthiest affairs.

speaker: COUNTESS
text: Not so, but as we change our courtesies.

speaker: COUNTESS
text: Will you draw near?

speaker: HELEN
text: “Till I have no wife I have nothing in France.”

speaker: HELEN
text: Nothing in France until he has no wife.

speaker: HELEN
text: Thou shalt have none, Rossillion, none in France.

speaker: HELEN
text: Then hast thou all again. Poor lord, is ’t I

speaker: HELEN
text: That chase thee from thy country and expose

speaker: HELEN
text: Those tender limbs of thine to the event

speaker: HELEN
text: Of the none-sparing war? And is it I

speaker: HELEN
text: That drive thee from the sportive court, where thou

speaker: HELEN
text: Wast shot at with fair eyes, to be the mark

speaker: HELEN
text: Of smoky muskets? O you leaden messengers

speaker: HELEN
text: That ride upon the violent speed of fire,

speaker: HELEN
text: Fly with false aim; move the still-’pearing air

speaker: HELEN
text: That sings with piercing; do not touch my lord.

speaker: HELEN
text: Whoever shoots at him, I set him there;

speaker: HELEN
text: Whoever charges on his forward breast,

speaker: HELEN
text: I am the caitiff that do hold him to ’t;

speaker: HELEN
text: And though I kill him not, I am the cause

speaker: HELEN
text: His death was so effected. Better ’twere

speaker: HELEN
text: I met the ravin lion when he roared

speaker: HELEN
text: With sharp constraint of hunger; better ’twere

speaker: HELEN
text: That all the miseries which nature owes

speaker: HELEN
text: Were mine at once. No, come thou home, Rossillion,

speaker: HELEN
text: Whence honor but of danger wins a scar,

speaker: HELEN
text: As oft it loses all. I will be gone.

speaker: HELEN
text: My being here it is that holds thee hence.

speaker: HELEN
text: Shall I stay here to do ’t? No, no, although

speaker: HELEN
text: The air of paradise did fan the house

speaker: HELEN
text: And angels officed all. I will be gone,

speaker: HELEN
text: That pitiful rumor may report my flight

speaker: HELEN
text: To consolate thine ear. Come, night; end, day;

speaker: HELEN
text: For with the dark, poor thief, I’ll steal away.
